name: Chocolate Delight Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients and mix until smooth.
2. The mixture will be very stiff. Press into a greased 9" x 13" pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chocolate chips.
4. Return to the oven for 1 minute. Spread melted chips over the crust.
5. Beat eggs until thick, then beat in sugar. Stir in melted margarine, vanilla, and nuts.
6. Spread over chocolate. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes.
7. Cut into 48 squares when cool.
